title: Excalibur | Primal Winter
description: Adds Excalibur resource pack support for the Primal Winter mod.
body:
![Excalibur and Primal Winter logos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/522dda11b7e7e2b9efe9343616272cea48af1097.png)


A simple resource pack integrating [**Primal Winter**](https://modrinth.com/mod/primal-winter)'s worldgen items (snowy logs, etc.) into the [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) style. Made for an upcoming modpack, but published for anyone who wants to use the mod and resource pack without clashing snowy terrain textures.
